free_text: Engl.translation of:
Graphs only
Abstract.
tabulated data
E.S.Konobeevskii=E.S.Konobeevskiy
Cross-sections for excitation of the first 2+ levels in
selenium isotopes by neutron inelastic scattering.
Van de Graaff EG-25.
T-Sc target of thickness ~8.keV; protons energy
2.0 MeV, proton bean current 15-20 microA.
Monoenergetic neutrons.
Natural isotopic composition. Ring form. 308.gram.
Cylindrical Ge(Li) detector of volume 74.cm**3
and energy resolution about 4.keV for gamma energy
1332.keV. To measure the gamma-ray yield.
Long counter as neutron yield monitor.
Excitation cross-sections were determined from
relative gamma yields and were normalized :
At 30 keV above threshold.
page 1604 in BAS.
These refs. for normalization procedure.
EN-NRM value explanation, see MONITOR and COMMENT.
Gammas
Of compiler M.M.
- On titles of figures the values of E-gamma are given,
but not E-LVL.
- Monitor value of 0.19 b is in the initial
compilation, but it's absent in the article.
This value is given in REL-REF for EN-NRM energy =
30 keV above threshold of MONITOR reaction;
value of 897 keV was taken by compiler from MONIT-REF.
Data were received from E.S.Konobeevskij
Errors in determination of average energy of
neutrons- near 5.keV.
Error due to absolute normalization
Data compiled at the centre
SD: Updated to new date formats,lower case.
EN-NRM -> E-LVL-NRM in COMMON. Data in Subents 002 -
004 were restored from archive. ERR-ANALYS updated.
Ref. on Engl.transl. of IZV added.
M.M. Articles were checked, BIB information
was updated in TITLE,AUTHOR,DETECTOR,REL-REF.
COMMENT and EN-NRM were added in Subent 001.
DATA-CM -> DATA according to comment of N.Otsuka (NDS,
IAEA).
(fig.2)
-Of authors. Cross sections for neutrons with energy
higher than 1217.keV contains a cross-section of
gamma-transitions from neutrons inelastic scattering on
1217.keV level that was not taken into account ( not
subtracted).
-Of compiler M.M. In the BAS article there is the wrong
translation of comment of authors above. In IZV article
it's explained, that "in exp. points given on figures
2, 3, this contribution is NOT taken into account" .
Error in determination of area of
gamma-line. The maximum errors in the relative cross
sections are of about this same size.
Data restored from old master file.
Left part of REACTION
was deleted according to the comment of N.Otsuka (NDS,
IAEA) .  E-LVL -> E ( gamma energy).
(fig.3)
- Of authors. Cross-section for neutrons with energy
higher then 1310.keV contains a cross-section of
gamma-transitions from neutrons inelastic scattering on
1310.keV level that was not taken into account (not
subtracted).
-Of compiler M.M. In the BAS article there is the wrong
translation of comment of authors above. In IZV article
it's explained, that "in exp. points given on figures
2, 3, this contribution is NOT taken into account" .
Error in determination of area of
gamma-line. The maximum errors in the relative cross
sections are of about this same size.
Data restored from old master file.
Left part of REACTION
was deleted according to the comment of N.Otsuka (NDS,
IAEA) .
(fig.4)
Error in determination of area of
gamma-line. The maximum errors in the relative cross
sections are of about this same size.
Data restored from old master file.
Left part of REACTION
was deleted according to the comment of N.Otsuka (NDS,
IAEA) .
(fig.5)
Error in determination of area of
gamma-line. The maximum errors in the relative cross
sections are of about this same size.
Data restored from old master file.
Left part of REACTION
was deleted according to the comment of N.Otsuka (NDS,
IAEA) .
